card.className: bg-gray-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-800 p-6 flex flex-col

primary.className: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2 justify-center

secondary.className: text-gray-400 hover:text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors rounded-lg

danger.className: bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition flex items-center justify-center space-x-2

icon.className: p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-full hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors

text.className: w-full bg-gray-800 border-none rounded-lg p-3 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 outline-none

transparent.className: w-full bg-transparent text-2xl font-bold text-white outline-none placeholder-gray-600

range.className: w-full h-2 bg-gray-700 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-blue-500

headers.modalTitle: text-xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2

modals.container: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm
modals.window: w-full max-w-md bg-gray-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-800 flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]
